Types

proc createBedrockMessage(api: OpenAiApi; config: BedrockConfig;

    ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError], tags: [ReadIOEffect,
    WriteIOEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}

    ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, Exception], tags: [
    ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
    ExecIOEffect], forbids: [].}

    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
